risks.description: As CBC Sports senior contributor Morgan Campbell writes, organizers witness record viewership during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and it all adds up to money — and new precedents set.

A look at the intense symbolism and "coincidences" that occured at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. It was more than sport, it was a mega-ritual.

risks.description: Lionel Messi came agonizingly close to a second World Cup title, but fell just short as Argentina lost to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final on July 19, and now it's time to rest up for the stretch run of the MLS season.
